title: What is Formal Methods?
role: NASA definition and baseline limits of formal methods
notes: Defines formal methods as mathematically rigorous specification, design, and verification; notes state-space limits.

title: The Dafny Programming and Verification Language
role: Official Dafny language description
notes: Dafny is a verification-aware programming language with native specs and static verifier.

title: Dafny: A Language and Program Verifier for Functional Correctness
role: Microsoft Research project background for Dafny
notes: Project context and publications for Dafny as a program verifier.

title: Leslie Lamport's TLA+ Home Page
role: Official creator-maintained TLA+ overview
notes: TLA+ is a high-level language for modeling systems, especially concurrent/distributed ones.

title: TLA+ Tools
role: Official tool overview for SANY, TLC, Apalache, TLAPS
notes: Explains TLC explicit-state model checking and Apalache symbolic model checking.

title: Lean Programming Language and Proof Assistant
role: Official Lean overview
notes: Lean is an open-source programming language and proof assistant.

title: DafnyBench: A Benchmark for Formal Software Verification
role: Benchmark for LLM-assisted Dafny verification
notes: 750+ programs and about 53k LOC; best prompting/model baseline reported 68% success.

title: sun-wendy/DafnyBench
role: Benchmark repository
notes: Open-source benchmark repository, 64 stars as captured by gh on 2026-05-17.

title: dafny-annotator: AI-Assisted Verification of Dafny Programs
role: LLM plus search for adding Dafny annotations
notes: Greedy LLM-guided annotation search; fine-tuning with DafnySynth improved success to about 50.6%.

title: dafny-annotator blog post
role: Dafny ecosystem blog explanation of dafny-annotator
notes: Accessible project write-up in the Dafny ecosystem.

title: metareflection/dafny-annotator
role: Tool repository for AI-assisted Dafny verification
notes: Repository for the dafny-annotator tool, 20 stars as captured by gh on 2026-05-17.

title: DafnyPro: LLM-Assisted Automated Verification for Dafny Programs
role: 2026 inference-time framework for Dafny annotations
notes: Adds diff-checker, pruning, and proof-strategy hint augmentation; reports 86% correct proofs on DafnyBench with Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

title: DafnyPro at Dafny 2026
role: Conference listing for DafnyPro
notes: Dafny 2026 workshop metadata and abstract.

title: From Natural Language to Verified Code
role: 2026 natural-language-to-Dafny verified code study
notes: NL2VC-60 dataset, open-weight LLMs, signature prompts and self-healing with Dafny verifier feedback; includes uDebug functional validation.

title: Intent Formalization: A Grand Challenge for Reliable Coding in the Age of AI Agents
role: 2026 position/research agenda for formalizing user intent
notes: Frames the intent gap and argues specifications are the central bottleneck for reliable coding agents.

title: Intent Formalization blog post
role: RiSE/MSR accessible version of the intent formalization argument
notes: Practitioner-friendly version of the paper with examples and research agenda.

title: Can LLMs model real-world systems in TLA+?
role: 2026 SIGOPS article on LLM-generated TLA+ models and SysMoBench
notes: Shows syntax/runtime scores are easy while conformance/invariant matching is hard; coding agents may improve the workflow.

title: LLMs and Formal Methods
role: Practitioner synthesis and provocation
notes: Argues LLMs and formal validators pair well in generate-check loops.

title: Designing Predictable LLM-Verifier Systems for Formal Method Guarantee
role: Theoretical LLM-verifier convergence paper, with HN skepticism
notes: Included because HN surfaced it; use cautiously due to practitioner criticism.

title: An In-Context Learning Agent for Formal Theorem-Proving
role: COPRA foundational theorem-proving agent
notes: Stateful backtracking search with proof-assistant feedback for Lean and Coq.

title: trishullab/copra
role: COPRA repository
notes: Repository for in-context proof agent, 72 stars as captured by gh on 2026-05-17.

title: Prover Agent: An Agent-Based Framework for Formal Mathematical Proofs
role: Agent framework for Lean formal mathematical proofs
notes: Revised through 2026; combines informal reasoning model, formal prover model, Lean feedback, and auxiliary lemmas.

title: kAIto47802/Prover-Agent
role: Prover Agent repository
notes: Repository for Prover Agent, 24 stars as captured by gh on 2026-05-17.

title: A Minimal Agent for Automated Theorem Proving
role: 2026 minimal theorem-proving agent baseline
notes: AxProverBase identifies iterative proof refinement, memory, and search as core useful scaffolding.

title: AgentGuard: Runtime Verification of AI Agents
role: Runtime verification framework for agent behavior
notes: Treats agent behavior as observed events, learns MDPs online, and uses probabilistic model checking.

title: GoPlusSecurity/agentguard
role: Runtime security guard implementation for coding agents
notes: Hooks for Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw and others; evaluates tool actions and scans agent skills; 403 stars as captured by gh.

title: AgentRaft: Automated Detection of Data Over-Exposure in LLM Agents
role: Program-analysis and runtime taint approach to agent privacy/data-flow risk
notes: Cross-tool function call graph, prompt synthesis, taint tracking, multi-LLM privacy judging; evaluated on 6,675 tools.

title: SEVerA: Verified Self-Evolving Agents
role: 2026 formally guarded generative model approach for self-evolving agents
notes: Uses formal output contracts and verified fallbacks; reports zero constraint violations across tasks including tool use and Dafny.

title: AgentVerify: Compositional Formal Verification of AI Agent Safety Properties via LTL Model Checking
role: Non-peer-reviewed 2026 preprint on LTL model checking for agent safety
notes: Compositional temporal-logic specs for memory, tool calls, MCP/skills, and human boundaries; treat cautiously.

title: Bridging LLM Planning Agents and Formal Methods
role: ASE 2025 AgenticSE workshop case study listing
notes: A plan-verification case study connecting LLM planners and formal methods.

title: Prediction: AI will make formal verification go mainstream
role: Practitioner signal about mainstreaming formal verification
notes: Useful as community/practitioner sentiment, not primary evidence.

title: HN: Can LLMs model real-world systems in TLA+?
role: Practitioner discussion of TLA+ modeling with LLMs
notes: Comments highlight optimism, difficulty of validating generated specs, and Verus-style alternatives.

title: HN: Designing Predictable LLM-Verifier Systems for Formal Method Guarantee
role: Skeptical practitioner discussion of theoretical LLM-verifier guarantee claims
notes: High-signal criticism that model assumptions matter and convergence claims can be thin.

title: HN: Lean 4 and AI theorem proving
role: Practitioner discussion of Lean as proof assistant for AI
notes: Useful explanations that theorem provers are closer to compile-time proof checking than ordinary tests.

title: Beneficial-AI-Foundation/dafny-autopilot
role: VS Code extension showing practical AI-assisted Dafny verification workflow
notes: Fills annotations, retries with Dafny verifier feedback, verifies highlighted functions, explains annotations.

title: RaghavRoy145/autocomplete-and-verify
role: Small Emacs package for formally verified LLM code generation and correction
notes: Low-star example of hobbyist tooling around autocomplete plus verification.
